gist.headline: Daily README Sync
gist.blurb: Automated daily update of the README and social news pipeline.
gist.summary: Automated bot update to sync the latest news and recent apps to the README and social pipeline.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page up to date with the latest community highlights.
gist.visual_concept: A robot and bee updating a giant billboard or newspaper.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a monitor head and the bee mascot updating a large wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a monitor head and the bee mascot updating a large wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
